steps.title: Add the two equations
steps.content:
Add the two equations to eliminate $$x$$:
$$y + y = \left(\frac{x}{4}+6\right)+\left(-\frac{x}{4}+20\right)$$

steps.title: Simplify to find 2y
steps.content:
Simplify the right side:
$$2y = \frac{x}{4}-\frac{x}{4}+6+20 = 26$$
Therefore, $2y = 26$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
